booking_request.title: BookingRequest
booking_request.description: Represents a customer's booking or inquiry request for an event

customerName.description: The name of the customer making the request

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer

emailAddress.description: The email address of the customer

eventType.description: The type of event being requested

eventDate.description: The planned date of the event

location.description: The location where the event is to be held

status.description: The approval or coordination state of the request

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the request was submitted

booking_requests/{requestId}.description: Customer inquiry and booking requests for events
